title: GFW injector fleet
scope: apparatus-layer tomography of the Great Firewall's DNS-injector fleet: size, forged-IP pools, regional divergence, and operational events
method: the censor as sensor — benign stateless UDP DNS probes provoke the GFW's own injectors to answer; we fingerprint the fleet from the forgeries. Direct transport = fleet size; open-resolver fallback = pool/regional.

events.detail: province CN-HA pool diverges from national baseline
province CN-HA pool diverges from national baseline
